sizing_rule.note: Risk 2% per trade when both win rate ≥50% AND reward-to-risk ≥3:1 (high expectancy). Reduce risk proportionally when either metric falls below threshold. Never exceed 5% portfolio risk per trade.

source_rule_text: A trader should risk a higher percentage of portfolio per trade when system expectancy is high (win rate >50% AND reward-to-risk ratio ≥3:1), and a lower percentage when expectancy is lower.
